heading: Effective use of resources for nonproliferation programs
label: 1526 Effective use of resources for nonproliferation programs
notes: References in TextThe National Security Act of 1947, referred to in subsec. (b), is , , which was formerly classified principally to chapter 15 (§ 401 et seq.) of this title, prior to editorial reclassification in chapter 44 (§ 3001 et seq.) of this title. Title V of the Act is now classified generally to subchapter III (§ 3091 et seq.) of chapter 44 of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act July 26, 1947, ch. 34361 Stat. 495

children.heading: Prohibition
children.label: a Prohibition
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), no assistance may be provided by the United States Government to any person who is involved in the research, development, design, testing, or evaluation of chemical or biological weapons for offensive purposes.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: b Exception
children.text: The prohibition contained in subsection (a) shall not apply to any activity conducted pursuant to title V of the National Security Act of 1947 [ et seq.].50 U.S.C. 3091
